abort.already_configured: Device with this IP address and Device ID is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check IP address, port, and network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication error. Check Device ID settings.
error.invalid_input: Invalid configuration provided. Check values and try again.
error.invalid_slave: Device ID must be between 0 and 247.
error.invalid_slave_low: Device ID must be 0 or greater.
error.invalid_slave_high: Device ID must be 247 or less.
error.missing_host: Host is required for Modbus TCP connections.
error.invalid_serial_port: Serial port path is required for Modbus RTU.
error.connection_refused: Connection was refused by the host.
error.missing_method: Scanner is missing required method. See logs for details.
error.io_error: Input/output error during device communication. Check cabling and network connection.
error.invalid_capabilities: Device capabilities data invalid or missing.
error.invalid_format: Received data in an unexpected format from device.
error.modbus_error: Modbus communication error. Check wiring and settings.
error.max_registers_range: Max registers per request must be between 1 and 16.
error.timeout: Device did not respond in time. Verify network connectivity and address.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.

confirm.description: Detected ThesslaGreen device {device_name} (serial {serial_number}) via {transport_label} {endpoint}. Device ID: {slave_id}. Firmware version: {firmware_version}. Registers found: {register_count}. Scan success rate: {scan_success_rate}. Capabilities ({capabilities_count}): {capabilities_list}. {auto_detected_note}. Continue with this configuration?
confirm.title: Confirm Configuration

data_description.connection_type: Choose between Modbus TCP (network), Modbus TCP RTU (RTU over TCP), or Modbus RTU (serial)
data_description.connection_mode: Choose TCP gateway, raw RTU over TCP, or auto-detect the TCP mode
data_description.host: IP address of the AirPack device on your local network
data_description.name: Device name in Home Assistant
data_description.serial_port: Serial device path for Modbus RTU (for example /dev/ttyUSB0)
data_description.baud_rate: Baud rate for Modbus RTU communication
data_description.parity: Parity setting for Modbus RTU communication
data_description.stop_bits: Stop bits for Modbus RTU communication
data_description.deep_scan: Read all registers for diagnostics (may be slow)

user.description: Set up a connection to a ThesslaGreen AirPack over Modbus TCP or Modbus RTU. The integration automatically detects device functions and registers.
user.title: ThesslaGreen Modbus Configuration

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure ThesslaGreen
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your AirPack device.

error.max_registers_range: Max registers per request must be between 1 and 16.

data_description.enable_device_scan: Enable automatic device scan during setup
data_description.force_full_register_list: Skip scanning and load all registers (may cause errors)
data_description.retry: How many times to retry failed reads (1-5 attempts)
data_description.safe_scan: Avoid grouped register reads for compatibility
data_description.scan_interval: How often to read data from device (10-300 seconds)
data_description.skip_missing_registers: Do not poll registers known to be unavailable
data_description.sync_device_clock_enabled: Automatically sync device RTC clock from HA time. Disabled by default. When enabled, this writes to the physical device RTC clock.
data_description.sync_device_clock_max_drift_seconds: Only sync if drift exceeds this threshold (30-86400 s)
data_description.sync_device_clock_on_start: Sync once after first successful device connection
data_description.timeout: Maximum time to wait for response (5-60 seconds)
data_description.scan_uart_settings: Read UART port configuration registers from the device during scanning
data_description.airflow_unit: Unit for displaying airflow values (percentage or cubic metres per hour)

init.description: Configure advanced integration options. Current settings: Scan interval: {current_scan_interval}s. Timeout: {current_timeout}s. Retry count: {current_retry}. Force full register list: {force_full_enabled}. Device scan enabled: {device_scan_enabled}. Skip known missing registers: {skip_missing_enabled}. Deep scan: {deep_scan_enabled}. Safe scan: {safe_scan_enabled}. Max registers per request: {current_max_registers_per_request}. Log level: {current_log_level}. Transport: {transport_label}{transport_details}.
init.title: ThesslaGreen Modbus Options
